\documentclass[11pt]{article}
\usepackage[margin=1in]{geometry}
\usepackage{amsmath,amssymb,amsfonts,mathtools}
\usepackage{booktabs,multirow,array,tabularx}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{makecell,longtable,threeparttable,siunitx}
\title{Clinical Table Sample 5}
\author{Dataset-expansion sample}
\date{}
\begin{document}
\maketitle
\section{Patient Data}
The table below is a medical-literature table reproduced verbatim from a PubMed-derived dataset.

\begin{table}
\begin{tabular}{|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|l|}
\hline
 & \multicolumn{17}{c|}{\textbf{Percent of individual counts of demonstrated patterns (patterns without any counts are not listed)}} \\
\hline
\textbf{Subjects} & \textbf{P1} & \textbf{P2} & \textbf{P3} & \textbf{P4} & \textbf{P5} & \textbf{P6} & \textbf{P7} & \textbf{P8} & \textbf{P9} & \textbf{P1}0 & \textbf{P1}1 & \textbf{P1}2 & \textbf{P1}3 & \textbf{P1}4 & \textbf{P1}5 & \textbf{P1}6 \\
\hline
Patterns* & \multicolumn{16}{c|}{Long swings, summarized all (LS: n = 103)} & \% in total \\
\hline
1-2-3 & 85.7 & 92.9 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 83.3 & 100 & 33.3 & 33.3 &  & 100 &  & 43.7 & 80 & 90 & 100 & 76.1 \\
\hline
2-1-3 &  & 7.1 &  &  &  & 16.7 &  &  & 50 & 100 &  &  & 25 &  &  &  & 13.3 \\
\hline
1-3-2 & 14.3 &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  & 25 &  & 10 &  & 3.3 \\
\hline
2-3-1 &  &  &  &  &  &  &  & 66.7 & 16.7 &  &  &  & 6.3 & 20 &  &  & 7.3 \\
\hline
\multirow{2}{*}{Sum} & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 \\
\hline
\multicolumn{16}{c|}{Near axis swings, summarized all (NAS: n = 31)} & \% in total \\
\hline
1-2-3 & 80 &  & 33.3 &  &  &  &  &  & 100 &  &  &  & 33.3 &  &  &  & 30.8 \\
\hline
2-1-3 & 20 &  & 66.7 &  &  & 50 & 100 & 100 &  &  & 66.7 &  & 66.7 &  &  &  & 58.8 \\
\hline
1-3-2 &  &  &  &  &  & 25 &  &  &  &  & 33.3 &  &  &  &  &  & 7.3 \\
\hline
2-3-1 &  &  &  &  &  & 25 &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  & 3.1 \\
\hline
\multirow{2}{*}{Sum} & 100 &  & 100 &  &  & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 &  & 100 &  & 100 &  &  &  & 100 \\
\hline
\multicolumn{16}{c|}{Upper arm swings, summarized all (UAS: n = 15)} & \% in total \\
\hline
2–3** &  &  &  &  & 100 & 100 & 100 &  & 100 &  &  &  &  &  &  &  & 80 \\
\hline
3–2 & 100 &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  & 20 \\
\hline
\multirow{2}{*}{Sum} & 100 &  &  &  & 100 & 100 & 100 &  & 100 &  &  &  &  &  &  &  & 100 \\
\hline
\multicolumn{16}{c|}{Support swings, summarized all (SupS: n = 138)} & \% in total \\
\hline
2–3** & 100 &  &  &  & 100 & 90.6 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 &  &  & 100 &  &  &  & 98.8 \\
\hline
3–2 &  &  &  &  &  & 9.4 &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  & 1.2 \\
\hline
\multirow{2}{*}{Sum} & 100 &  &  &  & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 &  &  & 100 &  &  &  & 100 \\
\hline
\multicolumn{16}{c|}{Handspring-Salto on Trampoline, summarized all (HSS: n = 15)} & \% in total \\
\hline
1-2-3 &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  & 80 & 80 & 100 & 86.7 \\
\hline
1-3-2 &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  & 20 & 20 &  & 13.3 \\
\hline
\multirow{2}{*}{Sum} &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 \\
\hline
\multicolumn{16}{c|}{Pivot movements, summarized all (Turns: n = 9)} & \% in total \\
\hline
1-2-3 &  &  &  &  & 100 & 100 & 100 & 50 & 100 & 100 &  & 100 &  &  &  &  & 81.3 \\
\hline
3-1-2 &  &  &  & 100 &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  & 12.5 \\
\hline
2-3-1 &  &  &  &  &  &  &  & 50 &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  & 6.2 \\
\hline
Sum &  &  &  & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 &  & 100 &  &  &  &  & 100 \\
\hline
All elements & \multicolumn{16}{c|}{All elements summarized (patterns in \% of counts) without UAS and SupS**} & \% in total \\
\hline
1-2-3 & 82.9 & 92.9 & 66.7 & 50 & 100 & 61.2 & 66.7 & 27.8 & 77.8 & 50 & 50 & 100 & 38.6 & 80 & 85 & 100 & 70.6 \\
\hline
2-1-3 & 10 & 7.1 & 33.3 &  &  & 22.2 & 33.3 & 33.3 & 16.7 & 50 & 33.3 &  & 45.8 &  & 15 &  & 18.8 \\
\hline
1-3-2 & 7.1 &  &  &  &  & 8.3 &  &  &  &  & 16.7 &  & 12.5 & 10 &  &  & 3.4 \\
\hline
3-1-2 &  &  &  & 50 &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  & 3.1 &  &  &  & 3.3 \\
\hline
2-3-1 &  &  &  &  &  & 8.3 &  & 38.9 & 5.5 &  &  &  &  & 10 &  &  & 3.9 \\
\hline
3-2-1 &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  & 0 \\
\hline
\multirow{2}{*}{Sum} & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 \\
\hline
\multicolumn{16}{c|}{UAS and SupS** summarized (patterns in \% of counts)} & \% in total \\
\hline
2–3** & 50 &  &  &  & 100 & 92.7 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 &  &  & 100 &  &  &  & 92.8 \\
\hline
\multirow{2}{*}{3–2} & 50 &  &  &  &  & 7.3 &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  &  & 7.2 \\
\hline
100 &  &  &  & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 & 100 &  &  & 100 &  &  &  & 100 \\
\hline
\textbf{Subjects} & \textbf{P1} & \textbf{P2} & \textbf{P3} & \textbf{P4} & \textbf{P5} & \textbf{P6} & \textbf{P7} & \textbf{P8} & \textbf{P9} & \textbf{P1}0 & \textbf{P1}1 & \textbf{P1}2 & \textbf{P1}3 & \textbf{P1}4 & \textbf{P1}5 & \textbf{P1}6 \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
\end{table}

\end{document}
